config.title: Pozycja sprzedaży #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'choice_ #include "L50200" 'section_ #include "L50222" 'list_* #include "50224"
'choose_opak* #include "L50606"
'HARUI_PRICE #include "50101"
#ifdef ENABLE_DB13 QVX_USER_FIELDS_NAMES(CTRLID_EX1,CTRLID_EX2,CTRLID_EX3,CTRLID_EX4,CTRLID_EX5,CTRLID_EX6,CTRLID_EX7,CTRLID_EX8,CTRLID_EX9,CTRLID_EX10,CTRLID_EX11) #else QVX_USER_FIELDS_NAMES(CTRLID_EX1,CTRLID_EX2,CTRLID_EX3,CTRLID_EX4,CTRLID_EX5,CTRLID_EX6) #endif
function fopen() : fopen = true #ifdef _GRAJEWSCY if not page_.root.pProdukt is nothing then if page_.root.pProdukt.strIndeks = "SO5" or page_.root.pProdukt.strIndeks = "SO8" or page_.root.pProdukt.strIndeks = "SO23" then if not HAR(UAR_ADD_UWAGI_SPRZEDAZ_OGOLNA) then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_UWAGI).disable = true end if end if end if #endif section_fopen THIS_FILE fopen=list_fopen() page_.updateview
#ifdef APPCONFIG_PRODUKT_UWAGI_AS_PARAMSET init_string_as_parameterset arrStringAsParameterSet #endif
end function
function show_stan_mag() doc_.getmodule(60136).make_raport_stanmag_ilosc_mag_prod_opak nothing , page_.root.pProdukt , page_.root.pOpak end function
QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_PRODUKT,pProdukt) QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_QUANTITY(CTRLID_ILOSC,page_.root.curIloscOpak,page_.root.pOpak,pJednOpak,1)
function c##CTRLID_ILOSCINFOTEXT##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl):c##CTRLID_ILOSCINFOTEXT##_ongetdata=true dim strText : strText = "" if not page_.root.pOpak is nothing then dim strJOName : strJOName = "" dim strJEName : strJEName = "" dim nJOPrec : nJOPrec = 2 dim nJEPrec : nJEPrec = 2
with page_.root.pOpak if not .pJednOpak is nothing then strJOName = .pJednOpak.strSkrot nJOPrec = .pJednOpak.nDokladnosc - 1 end if end with with page_.root.pProdukt if not .pJednostkaEwid is nothing then strJEName = .pJednostkaEwid.strSkrot nJEPrec = .pJednostkaEwid.nDokladnosc - 1 end if end with strText = doc_.afc.display.quantity(page_.root.curIloscOpak,strJOName,nJOPrec) + _ " to " + doc_.afc.display.quantity(page_.root.curIloscOpak * page_.root.pOpak.currKrotnosc,strJEName,nJEPrec)
end if oCtrl.text = strText end function
#ifdef APPCONFIG_PRODUKT_UWAGI_AS_PARAMSET
#include "L50228"
dim arrStringAsParameterSet(PRODUKT_UWAGI_AS_PARAMSET_COUNT)
QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_0,0,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_1,1,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_2,2,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_3,3,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_4,4,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_5,5,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_6,6,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_7,7,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_8,8,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_9,9,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_10,10,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_11,11,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_12,12,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_13,13,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_14,14,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_15,15,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_16,16,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_17,17,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_18,18,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_19,19,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_20,20,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_21,21,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_22,22,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi) QVE_VALUE_2_ARRAY_ITEM(CTRLID_PARAM_23,23,arrStringAsParameterSet,page_.root.strUwagi,page_.root.strUwagi)
#endif
#macro QVE_NETTO_BRUTTO_DISABLE_CURRENCY(_ctrl_,_fld_,_nb_,_pWaluta_) \ function c##_ctrl_##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##_ctrl_##_ongetdata=true \ if not page_.root.parent.eNettoBrutto = _nb_ then \ oCtrl.disable = true \ else \ oCtrl.disable = false \ end if \ oCtrl.value = page_.root._fld_ \ oCtrl.unit = _pWaluta_.strSkrot \ end function \ function c##_ctrl_##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) \ page_.root._fld_ = ccur(newValue) \ c##_ctrl_##_ondataentered=true \ end function
QVE_NETTO_BRUTTO_DISABLE_CURRENCY(CTRLID_CENABAZOWA_NETTO,curCenaBazNetto,N5SPRZEDAZ_NETTO,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta) QVE_NETTO_BRUTTO_DISABLE_CURRENCY(CTRLID_CENABAZOWA_BRUTTO,curCenaBazBrutto,N5SPRZEDAZ_BRUTTO,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta)
QVE_NETTO_BRUTTO_DISABLE_CURRENCY(CTRLID_CENA_NETTO,curCenaNetto,N5SPRZEDAZ_NETTO,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta) QVE_NETTO_BRUTTO_DISABLE_CURRENCY(CTRLID_CENA_BRUTTO,curCenaBrutto,N5SPRZEDAZ_BRUTTO,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta)
QVE_NETTO_BRUTTO_DISABLE_CURRENCY(CTRLID_CENA_WALUTA,curCenaNettoWal,N5SPRZEDAZ_NETTO,page_.root.parent.pWaluta) QVE_NETTO_BRUTTO_DISABLE_CURRENCY(CTRLID_CENABAZOWA_WALUTA,curCenaBazowaNettoWal,N5SPRZEDAZ_NETTO,page_.root.parent.pWaluta)
QVE_NETTO_BRUTTO_DISABLE_CURRENCY(CTRLID_CENABAZOWABRUTTOWALUTA,curCenaBazowaBruttoWal,N5SPRZEDAZ_BRUTTO,page_.root.parent.pWaluta) QVE_NETTO_BRUTTO_DISABLE_CURRENCY(CTRLID_CENABRUTTOWALUTA,curCenaBruttoWal,N5SPRZEDAZ_BRUTTO,page_.root.parent.pWaluta)
QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE(CTRLID_WARTKONCWAL,page_.root.curWartWal,page_.root.parent.pWaluta,1) QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE(CTRLID_WARTBRUTTOWALUTA,page_.root.curWartBruttoWal,page_.root.parent.pWaluta,1)
function c##CTRLID_ZADANIE##_onsuggquery(byref pEditCtrl,byval strEnteredVal,byref strWhere,byref strOrder,byref strJoin) if page_.root.parent.pKlient is nothing then exit function end if if strWhere <> "" then strWhere = strWhere + " and " end if strWhere = strWhere + "(pKlient = " + cstr(page_.root.parent.pKlient.idobj) + ")" end function
function c##CTRLID_KLIENT_OBIEKT##_onsuggquery(byref pEditCtrl,byval strEnteredVal,byref strWhere,byref strOrder,byref strJoin) if page_.root.parent.pKlient is nothing then exit function end if if strWhere <> "" then strWhere = strWhere + " and " end if strWhere = strWhere + "(klob_pKlient = " + cstr(page_.root.parent.pKlient.idobj) + ")" end function

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_POSTAWOWE,Dane podstawowe,FORM_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_OPEN(CTRLID_PRODUKT,Produkt,1)
QXE_EDIT_REF(CTRLID_PRODUKT_EDIT,40,pProdukt,strNazwa,CRSR_DEFAULT)
#ifndef SPPF_DISABLE_PRODOPAK QXE_PICTURE_ACTION(-1,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT,varFunctionHLI="std_choose_prod_hli" vs1="pProdukt" varCursor=CRSR_DEFAULT ,Wybór produktu) #endif
QXC_LABEL(Opakowanie,1)
QXE_EDIT_WILDREF_DELONLY(-1,40,pOpak) #ifndef SPPF_DISABLE_PRODOPAK QXE_PICTURE_ACTION(-1,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5OPAKOWANIE_PRODUKTU,varFunctionHLI="std_choose_opak_hli" vs1="pOpak" vs2="pProdukt",Wybór opakowania) #endif
QXC_LABEL(Ilość,1) QXC_QUANTITY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_ILOSC,MCELL_SPAN) QXC_INFO_CUSTOM(,CTRLID_ILOSCINFOTEXT,1)
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL(,1) QXC_LABEL(netto,1) QXC_LABEL( ,1) QXC_LABEL(brutto,1) QXC_LABEL( ,1) QXC_LABEL(netto,1) QXC_LABEL( ,1) QXC_LABEL(brutto,1)
QXC_LABEL(Cena bazowa,1) QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_CENABAZOWA_WALUTA,14,#*gvar_price_prec,,1)
QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_CENABAZOWABRUTTOWALUTA,14,#*gvar_price_prec,,1)
QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_CENABAZOWA_NETTO,14,#*gvar_price_prec,#*gvar_valuta_firmy_unit,1)
QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_CENABAZOWA_BRUTTO,14,#*gvar_price_prec,#*gvar_valuta_firmy_unit,1)
QXR_RABAT_FIELD(Rabat,-1,curRabat,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL(Cena sprzedaży,1) QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_CENA_WALUTA,14,2,,1)
QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_CENABRUTTOWALUTA,14,2,,1)
QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_CENA_NETTO,14,#*gvar_price_prec,#*gvar_valuta_firmy_unit,1)
QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_CENA_BRUTTO,14,#*gvar_price_prec,#*gvar_valuta_firmy_unit,1)
#ifdef SPPF_CENY_WALUTA1
QXC_LABEL(Cena bazowa w walucie,1) QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_CENABAZOWA_WALUTA,14,#*gvar_price_prec,,1)
QXC_LABEL(Cena w walucie,1) QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(,14,#*gvar_price_prec,,1)
#endif
QXC_LABEL(Wartość,1) QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_WARTKONCWAL,14,2,,1)
QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_WARTBRUTTOWALUTA,14,2,,1)
QXE_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,14,2,#*gvar_valuta_firmy_unit,curWartNetto,)
QXE_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,14,2,#*gvar_valuta_firmy_unit,curWartBrutto,)
QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN)
#ifdef APPCONFIG_PRODUKT_UWAGI_AS_PARAMSET
QXS_BEGIN_OPT(SECID_UWAGI,Uwagi,FORM_SPAN)
QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_0,20,1) QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_1,20,1)
QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_2,20,1) QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_3,20,1)
QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_4,20,1) QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_5,20,1)
QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_6,20,1) QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_7,20,1)
QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_8,20,1) QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_9,20,1)
QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_10,20,1) QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_11,20,1)
QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_12,20,1) QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_13,20,1)
QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_14,20,1) QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_15,20,1)
QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_16,20,1) QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_17,20,1)
QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_18,20,1) QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_19,20,1)
QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_20,20,1) QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_21,20,1)
QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_22,20,1) QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_PARAM_23,20,1)
QXS_END_OPT(FORM_SPAN)
#else
#ifdef _GRAJEWSCY QXS_MULTILINE(SECID_UWAGI,CTRLID_UWAGI,strUwagi,Nazwa opisowa produktu,FORM_SPAN) #else #ifdef _METROX #if appvar_rejestr_typ = N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_SP QXS_MULTILINE(SECID_UWAGI,CTRLID_UWAGI,strUwagi,Przyczyna korekty,FORM_SPAN) #else QXS_MULTILINE(SECID_UWAGI,CTRLID_UWAGI,strUwagi,Uwagi,FORM_SPAN) #endif #else QXS_MULTILINE(SECID_UWAGI,CTRLID_UWAGI,strUwagi,Uwagi,FORM_SPAN) #endif #endif
#endif QXS_BEGIN_OPT(SECID_POWIAZANIA,Powiązania,FORM_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_REF_CQ(Zadanie,CTRLID_ZADANIE,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5ZADANIE,psprzed_pZadanie,strTemat,RCELL_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_REF_CQ(Obiekt,CTRLID_KLIENT_OBIEKT,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KLIENT_OBIEKT,psprzed_pKLOB,klob_strNazwa,RCELL_SPAN) QXS_END_OPT(FORM_SPAN)
#ifdef _GRAJEWSCY QXS_BEGIN_OPT(SECID_EXTRA,Pola użytkownika,FORM_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX2,15,1) QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,40,strExtra2,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX3,15,1) QXC_DATE_FIELD(-1,dExtra3,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX4,15,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,20,4,,curExtra4,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX5,15,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,20,4,,curExtra5,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX6,15,1) QXC_EDIT_REF(-1,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_ELEMENT,pKwalifikatorEX,strNazwa,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN)
#ifdef ENABLE_DB13 QXX_USER_FIELDS_DB13(CTRLID_EX7,CTRLID_EX8,CTRLID_EX9,CTRLID_EX10,CTRLID_EX11,RCELL_SPAN) #endif QXS_END_OPT(FORM_SPAN) #else #ifdef ENABLE_DB13 QXX_USER_FIELDS(SECID_EXTRA,CTRLID_EX1,CTRLID_EX2,CTRLID_EX3,CTRLID_EX4,CTRLID_EX5,CTRLID_EX6,CTRLID_EX7,CTRLID_EX8,CTRLID_EX9,CTRLID_EX10,CTRLID_EX11,FORM_SPAN,RCELL_SPAN) #else QXX_USER_FIELDS(SECID_EXTRA,CTRLID_EX1,CTRLID_EX2,CTRLID_EX3,CTRLID_EX4,CTRLID_EX5,CTRLID_EX6,FORM_SPAN,RCELL_SPAN) #endif #endif
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
#ifdef NEXTVERSION
QXE_BUTTON(CTRLID_GET_STAN_MAG,10,Pokaż dostępność,varFunction="show_stan_mag")
#endif
QXF_END
